title: We Clean. We Care. We Go Green.
subtitle: Clearing clutter the right way for a cleaner, greener tomorrow.

stages.title: We Revive
stages.description: We collect junk, clutter & unwanted items responsibly

stages.title: We Sort
stages.description: We carefully sort every item to decide the best next step

stages.title: We Donate, Recycle & Resale
stages.description: Usable items are donated to those in need. Recyclable materials are sent to recycling facilities. Valuable items are resold to give them a new life.

stages.title: We Plant
stages.description: For every place we clean, we plant 2 trees to give back to nature
